description_long: This is a modern, boxy chaise lounge upholstered in a dark, textured fabric, with a soft, draped throw blanket covering the backrest and partially cascading over both armrests. The chaise features a wide, deep seat and high, straight armrests on both sides, providing a sense of enclosure and comfort. The backrest is tall and rectangular, matching the armrests in height and covered by the same throw. The upholstery appears to have a subtle woven pattern, adding visual interest to the otherwise solid color. The base of the chaise is solid and extends to the floor, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and sturdy appearance. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or communal outdoor spaces.
description: A contemporary, boxy chaise lounge with dark textured upholstery and a draped throw blanket over the backrest and armrests. The design is solid, with high armrests and a wide seat, exuding comfort and modern style.
description_view_0: Side view showing the high, straight armrest and the throw blanket draped over the backrest and armrest.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide seat, both armrests, and the throw blanket cascading over the backrest.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with the throw blanket similarly draped over the armrest and backrest.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full coverage of the throw blanket over the backrest and the solid, boxy structure of the chaise.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is tall, rectangular, and fully upholstered, matching the height of the armrests. It is covered by a draped throw blanket, giving it a soft, inviting appearance without visible segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, which are straight, high, and fully upholstered, providing a boxy and enclosed feel.
attribute_leg_style: No visible legs are present; the base extends directly to the floor, giving the chaise a solid, monolithic appearance.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery features a subtle, woven texture with a dark, almost checkered pattern, while the throw blanket has a soft, slightly mottled appearance.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, wide seat cushion integrated into the chaise, with no separate or loose cushions visible. The throw blanket adds a layered, casual touch to the backrest and armrests.
